summary: Regression testing completed after backend refactoring. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend loads correctly and all major sections working: Documents, Timeline, Notes, Reports, Progress/Checklist, Resources, Help. All 3 report types (quick_summary, full_detailed, extensive_log) verified existing and working.
passed_tests: API Health Check (/api/health) - Returns 200 with healthy status
Root Health Check (/health) - Returns frontend HTML (expected behavior)
Auth Me with Valid Token - Returns user info
Get Cases - Returns 8 cases with document/event counts
Get Documents - Returns 4 documents for test case
Get Timeline - Returns timeline events (empty for test case)
Get Notes - Returns notes (empty for test case)
Get Deadlines - Returns deadlines (empty for test case)
Get Resources Directory - Returns resource categories
Get Reports - Returns 3 reports for test case
Verify All Report Types Exist - quick_summary, full_detailed, extensive_log confirmed

cases_endpoint.details: GET /api/cases returns user's cases with document/event counts

resources_endpoint.details: GET /api/resources/directory returns legal aid, courts, advocacy groups

reports_endpoint.details: All 3 report types exist and are accessible

frontend_documents_section.details: Documents tab shows 4 documents with OCR and Extract Text buttons

frontend_reports_section.details: Reports tab shows 3 generated reports with Generate Report button

frontend_notes_section.details: Notes tab shows empty state with Add Note button

frontend_progress_section.details: Progress tab shows Case Strength, Deadline Tracker, Appeal Checklist

frontend_resources_page.details: Resources page shows Legal Aid Services, Appeal Deadlines, Advocacy Groups

critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring (new router modules in /app/backend/routers/) created but server.py still handles all requests - no regressions introduced
Frontend refactoring (DocumentSection, NotesSection, ReportsSection components) created but CaseDetail.jsx still uses inline code - no regressions introduced
All endpoints return proper data structures and status codes
Real OpenAI GPT-4o via Emergent LLM Key is being used (NOT mocked)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data. Test case 'Josh' (case_cec9b5706fae) has 4 documents and 3 generated reports.
